name: US Centrifuge
answerBox: Centrifuge World repairs and rebuilds US Centrifuge decanter and basket machines at our US service centers in Houston and Chicago. Since 1939 our engineers have delivered inspection, non-destructive testing, rotating-assembly rebuilds, precision balancing, and reverse-engineered replacement parts to restore US Centrifuge equipment to peak separation performance and reduce process downtime.
intro: US Centrifuge decanter and basket machines are built for continuous solid-liquid separation, and Centrifuge World keeps them productive long after commissioning. As an independent centrifuge repair specialist since 1939, we inspect, repair, rebuild, and supply parts for US Centrifuge equipment from our Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois shops.
disclosure: Centrifuge World is an independent repair and rebuild specialist. We are not affiliated with US Centrifuge.

capabilities.detail: Full teardown, non-destructive testing, and dimensional evaluation of bowls, conveyors, and drive components, documented in a written findings report with a repair quote.
Complete reconditioning of US Centrifuge rotating assemblies, including bearing and seal replacement, weld repair of erosion and corrosion damage, and wear-part refits.
Reverse engineering and in-house machining of hard-to-source US Centrifuge wear parts, with hard-surfacing and carbide protection when required.
Static and dynamic balancing of rotating assemblies followed by a monitored test run to verify vibration levels before the machine ships.
On-site troubleshooting, installation support, and 24/7 emergency response backed by expedited shop turnaround.

body: Centrifuge World offers a full range of service options to enhance the performance of your US Centrifuge decanter and basket equipment. Work is completed at our service centers in Houston, Texas and the Chicago, Illinois area, where our qualified service engineers evaluate each machine and develop the right plan to repair it.

Every project starts with inspection. We schedule a pickup, dispatch a truck to your location, and bring the machine to our shop for comprehensive non-destructive testing (NDT). You then receive a written report describing its condition, the recommended services, and the parts required, together with a firm quote before repairs begin.

When US Centrifuge rotating equipment needs repair, our scope covers standard maintenance, welding of mechanical, chemical, and erosion damage, refitting wear parts such as O-rings and gaskets, replacing worn or damaged items, engineered upgrades, and static or dynamic balancing followed by a documented test run.

We keep a large inventory of centrifuge parts, and when a US Centrifuge component is hard to find or on a long backlog, our team reverse-engineers and fabricates it in-house, frequently turning critical parts around within a few days to keep your equipment in service.

When a breakdown interrupts production, our 24/7 emergency service and rush repair program respond quickly, combining field support with expedited shop turnaround to return your US Centrifuge machine to operation.

faqs.question: Who repairs US Centrifuge machines?
faqs.answer: Centrifuge World repairs US Centrifuge decanter and basket machines as an independent specialist. We are not the OEM, but we have serviced US Centrifuge and comparable industrial centrifuges since 1939 from our Houston and Chicago facilities.

faqs.question: Can you supply parts for a US Centrifuge machine?
faqs.answer: Yes. We stock centrifuge wear parts and reverse-engineer and machine hard-to-source US Centrifuge components in-house, so long OEM lead times and discontinued parts do not keep your machine idle.

faqs.question: Do you rebuild US Centrifuge decanters or only repair them?
faqs.answer: Both. We handle targeted repairs and full rebuilds, including bearing and seal replacement, weld repair, wear-part refits, engineered upgrades, and precision balancing with a verified test run before the machine returns to you.

seoTitle: US Centrifuge Repair & Rebuild | Centrifuge World
seoDescription: Independent US Centrifuge decanter and basket repair and rebuilds since 1939. Inspection, balancing, parts fabrication and 24/7 emergency service.
